steps.title: Explain the resistance
steps.content: The sentence says no amount of justification for a higher toll will persuade some drivers. That reaction makes sense if they already believe the current toll is unreasonably high.

steps.title: Reject weaker attitudes
steps.content: Choice A means justified, the opposite of the drivers' objection. Choice C means ambiguous, but the drivers' view is firm. Choice D means disputed, which is too vague to explain resistance to a higher toll. The answer is B.
